mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, request_id, client_id, capability_id, capability_code, capability_version, operation, object_code, record_id, task_ref, idempotency_key, request_digest, actor_type, actor_user_id, service_user_id, active_org_id, execute_status, result_code, result_snapshot, error_code, duration_ms, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
